body:
Thanks for helping to make it an awesome year. There were so many highlights from this big year (both professionally and personally), so I thought a round up of reflection would be fun.

1.ô This Project Life spreadô made for Two Peas in a Bucket

2.ô Our little getaway to Palm Springsô (where we were actually celebrating being about 10 weeks pregnant!)

3. Being atô Craftcationô for the second year in a row. I will be there again forô Craftcation 2014!

4.ô The big little secret!

5.ô A trip to Hawaiiô for the little cutie (small tangerine) in my belly.

6.ô Sharing the news with friendsô - in photos and video.

7.ô Being in Christchurch, New Zealand

8. Saying goodbye toô our little Venice apartment

9. Ourô babymoonô andô the book

11. My baby shower +ô the album created there

12.ô The birth of our sweet baby boy, Jack

13.ô The Story of Usô when Jack was 7 weeks old

Looking forward to sharing even more with you all in 2014! If there are any particular posts you are drawn to, please share in the comments. Or if you have any questions, ask away!
